zh.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont於1114年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾度斯利。她於1150年與William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年4月24日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont于1114年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾度斯利。她于1150年与William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1197年4月24日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont was born in 1114, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester in 1150, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 24 April 1197, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont est née en 1114, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester en 1150, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1197, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont wurde 1114 in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1150 in Leicestershire, England William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1197 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont è nata il nel 1114 nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester nel 1150, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1197, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumontは1114年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで生まれた。1150年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでWilliam FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年4月24日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont(은)는 1114년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1150년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 4월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont nasceu em 1114, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester em 1150, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1197, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont родилась в 1114 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester в 1150 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 24 апреля 1197 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Hawise de Beaumont nació en 1114, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester en 1150, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1197, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
